summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of AI Governance website. All requested features implemented and working correctly: varied research article titles, Library page with 4 resource sections, hidden admin button, admin authentication, mailto contact form, and purple accent theme.
passed_tests: Research page displays articles with varied titles (not all 'When...' format)
Library page accessible from navigation with 4 sections: Foundational Frameworks, Regulatory & Policy Sources, Standards & Technical Bodies, Ongoing Developments
Navigation includes LIBRARY link and all nav items functional
Hidden admin button in footer styled as small gray dot (8px x 8px)
Admin button navigates correctly to /admin page
Admin page rejects incorrect passphrases and accepts correct one
Contact form opens mailto with pre-filled subject and body content
Purple accents (#6366f1) visible throughout site in navigation, buttons, icons
All external resource links in Library page open in new tab
Form fields and interactive elements respond correctly
Responsive design and styling working properly
